name: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair
description: It's a fight for the future of the planet between the Ravagers, a merciless swarm of alien invaders, and the Earth Defense Force (EDF) in this third-person shooter.Play as four different classes in over 80 missions with a range of 800 weapons at your disposal.Co-op play supported.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 64bit, Windows 8.1 64bit Windows 10 64bit
  • Processor: 3 GHz 2 Core
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: AMD Radeon HD 7870 / NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660　（2GB Model or higher）
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX 11 sound device
  • Additional Notes: XInput Controller
